comparison_label: Paired HCC versus adjacent non-tumorous liver in GSE60502
inclusion_rule_summary: Use the paired HCC and adjacent non-tumorous liver samples disclosed in GSE60502.
exclusion_rule_summary: Do not treat adjacent tissue as equivalent to healthy liver in any cross-study aggregation without an explicit correction.
leakage_risks: Adjacent non-tumorous tissue is not the same as healthy liver.

provenance.notes: Counts and paired design are recoverable from the public GEO record.
